AICARDMOD-FAITH_POWER.title: Faith
AICARDMOD-FAITH_POWER.description: A resource that persists between turns.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_POWER.title: Revelation
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, every 3 [gold]Revelation[/gold] triggers 1 holy arrow.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_POWER.smartDescript:
Current [gold]Revelation[/gold]: [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
Every 3 stacks triggers a holy arrow at end of turn.
AICARDMOD-INFINITE_GLORY_POWER.title: Infinite Glory
AICARDMOD-INFINITE_GLORY_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever [gold]Revelation[/gold] triggers, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Triggered [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s).
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.title: Prepared Draw
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.descripti: At the start of your next turn, adjust draw count, then remove.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_DRAW_POWER.smartDesc: Next turn draw count changes by [blue]{Amount}[/blue], then remove.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_ENERGY_POWER.title: Stored Energy
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_ENERGY_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, gain extra Energy, then remove.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_ENERGY_POWER.smartDe: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Energy next turn start, then remove.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_REVELATION_POWER.des: At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Revelation[/gold], then remove.
AICARDMOD-NEXT_TURN_REVELATION_POWER.sma: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Revelation[/gold] next turn start, then remove.
AICARDMOD-PIETY_END_TURN_POWER.title: Relic Box
AICARDMOD-PIETY_END_TURN_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Faith[/gold].
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_START_TURN_POWER.de: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Revelation[/gold].
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_PER_CARD_THIS_TURN_: Each card you play this turn grants [gold]Revelation[/gold].
Each card you play this turn grants [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Revelation[/gold].
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_ECHO_POWER.title: Revelation Echo
AICARDMOD-HOLY_MIGHT_POWER.title: Holy Might
AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_POWER.title: Doomsday Judgment
AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_POWER.descri: After each [gold]Revelation[/gold] trigger, subsequent [gold]Revelation[/gold] damage this turn increases.
AICARDMOD-DOOMSDAY_JUDGMENT_POWER.smartD: After each [gold]Revelation[/gold] trigger, subsequent [gold]Revelation[/gold] damage +[blue]{Amount}[/blue] this turn.
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_POWER.title: Causality
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_POWER.description: This turn, that enemy takes additional damage whenever it is damaged.
AICARDMOD-CAUSALITY_POWER.smartDescripti: This turn, that enemy takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage per hit.
AICARDMOD-MISSTEP_POWER.title: Misstep
AICARDMOD-MISSTEP_POWER.description: Each attack deals 25% less damage. Lose 1 stack per hit.
AICARDMOD-MISSTEP_POWER.smartDescription: Each attack deals 25% less damage. Lose 1 stack per hit. [blue]{Amount}[/blue] stack(s) remaining.
AICARDMOD-CLEANSE_SIN_POWER.title: Cleanse Sin
AICARDMOD-CLEANSE_SIN_POWER.description: Whenever you lose [gold]Faith[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the amount lost.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_CHOIR_POWER.title: Holy Choir
AICARDMOD-HOLY_CHOIR_POWER.description: [gold]Revelation[/gold] attacks all enemies instead of one.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_CHOIR_POWER.smartDescript: [gold]Revelation[/gold] attacks all enemies instead of one.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_WILL_POWER.title: Holy Will
AICARDMOD-HOLY_WILL_POWER.description: The next Skill you play this turn is played twice.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_WILL_POWER.smartDescripti: The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Skill(s) you play this turn are played twice.
AICARDMOD-NO_ATTACK_THIS_TURN_POWER.desc: Your attacks deal no damage this turn. Removed at end of turn.
AICARDMOD-NO_ATTACK_THIS_TURN_POWER.smar: Your attacks deal no damage this turn. Removed at end of turn.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_RETAIN_PERCENT_POWE: At end of turn, retain a portion of [gold]Revelation[/gold] instead of losing all of it.
At end of turn, retain [blue]{Amount}[/blue]% of [gold]Revelation[/gold].
AICARDMOD-SAINTESS_FORM_POWER.title: Saintess Form
AICARDMOD-SAINTESS_FORM_POWER.descriptio: Every 7 [gold]Revelation[/gold] triggers, gain 1 Energy next turn.
AICARDMOD-SAINTESS_FORM_POWER.smartDescr: Every 7 [gold]Revelation[/gold] triggers, gain 1 Energy next turn. Progress: [blue]{Amount}[/blue]/7.
AICARDMOD-TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWER.title: Surge of Power
AICARDMOD-TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWER.descr: Attacks deal additional damage this turn. Removed next turn start.
AICARDMOD-TEMPORARY_STRENGTH_POWER.smart: Attacks deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage this turn. Removed next turn start.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_FOCUS_POWER.title: Revelation Focus
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_FOCUS_POWER.descrip: [gold]Revelation[/gold] prioritizes this enemy. Removed at end of your turn.
AICARDMOD-REVELATION_FOCUS_POWER.smartDe: [gold]Revelation[/gold] targets this enemy [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s). Removed at end of your turn.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_CHALICE_POWER.title: Holy Chalice
AICARDMOD-TITHE_POWER.title: Tithe
AICARDMOD-TITHE_POWER.description: At the end of combat, gain [gold]Gold[/gold].
AICARDMOD-TITHE_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
